reviews.review_title: this game has potential devs see this
reviews.review_description: it's okay the graphics kind of bad but i have to suggestion for you make it like ark so you can like tame the dinosaurs and make them yours and add more dinosaurs please this could do a lot

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you so much for your attention to our game and for your review — it truly motivates us and inspires us to keep going.
We’re huge fans of ARK too — it’s an awesome game! Unfortunately, we don’t have the resources yet to make a leap like that. We’re working hard to build them up, as we’re just a very small team of passionate enthusiasts and game fans.

I love this game its my favorite.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for your feedback, we pay attention to them and they are important to us as we want to make the game better. We will try to figure out how to realize what you described, taking into account the technical and financial constraints that we have. 
P.S. Thank you especially for your polite criticism! :)

reviews.review_description:
For a free game this is actually decently fun to mess around in

And there’s dinosaurs
Not grate but still fun…
If you cant find the hammers just press grip and they will come to you. The ai isnt the best though because the compys are highly aggressive
Fun at first but not a big enough map the after u die they try to make u pay to get better weapons
This game is horse poop do not download
Why is buddy trying to get me to pay real money to upgrade my weapons so that I don't get killed by a pack of goofy Dinosaurs in a game that doesn't look fully developed?☠️

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for your feedback. We understand your wishes and that is why the game can be installed for free, but to make it really better, we need to pay for the work, because no one wants to program for free. That is why the game has the ability to make purchases, which ultimately go to its improvement. We are not a huge game studio, we are just a few guys who love creating games (and hunting:) and want to create something cool and fun

reviews.review_description: Hi I am REDØUT and I am a game developer and I think this game has a lot of potential and all I would suggest is adding Carnufex carolinensis, changing the background sound a bit, adding a title and adding a bit more to the game like a larger map (or multiple) and adding more dinosaurs/therapsids/crocodylomorphs (like Carnufex) and if you need any help developing your game feel free to to call me on discord @wintergstudios_68390

There's really no need to even have this crap I guess you can call it on any kind of website or even anywhere I don't see why it's posted it has no potential at all it has no meaning at all so if you value your time in life for nothing then this might be something for you is the most senseless and pointless and stupid concept of what somebody thinks is a game is I feel bad for the Developers and their comprehension of what a game is

developer_response.body: It's sad to hear such a negative opinion about a game that has just been released and is starting its journey, but we treat it with respect, as we do with any opinion of the players. It would be productive to indicate exactly what you don’t like and what you would change.
